classObjective: Write two-column proofs to justify angle relationships including congruent supplements, congruent complements, and right angles.
workedExamples: 12-6, Example 1 — Apply the Angle Addition Postulate in Proofs
12-6, Example 2 — Write Two-Column Proofs with Congruent Angles
12-6, Example 3 — Prove Angle Congruence Using Supplements
warmUp: What is the relationship between angles that are supplementary to the same angle?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: Angle Addition Postulate in proofs; linear pairs; supplementary/complementary angle theorems; right angle congruence
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing angle relationship proofs including supplement and complement cases
independentPractice: Practice problems writing proofs for angle congruence using angle relationship theorems
assessment: Exit ticket: write a two-column proof showing that if two angles are supplementary to the same angle, they are congruent
capReflection: Why are supplementary and complementary angle theorems useful in proof writing?
